title: Responsible Path to Full Obamacare Repeal Act
short_title: Responsible Path to Full Obamacare Repeal Act
stage_label: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committees on Ways and Means, Education and Wor
crs_summary: Responsible Path to Full Obamacare Repeal Act This bill repeals the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act and the Health Care and Education Reconciliation Act of 2010, effective at the beginning of FY2026. Provisions of law amended by those acts are restored.
last_action_text: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committees on Ways and Means, Education and Workforce, Natural Resources, the Judiciary, House Administration, Rules, and Appro
